message:
feat(testutil): add SkipIfCPUOverloaded helper for flaky test prevention

Adds SkipIfCPUOverloaded() function that samples CPU utilization over
200ms and skips the test if ALL cores are at 95%+ usage. This prevents
false failures in timing-based benchmark tests when the system is under
extreme load from other processes (e.g., multiple agent swarms running
concurrently).

Key design decisions:
- Only skips when ALL cores are saturated (not just high average)
- Uses 200ms sample window for stable measurement
- Gracefully proceeds if CPU measurement fails
- Includes descriptive skip message for debugging

Usage: call SkipIfCPUOverloaded(t) at start of any test with timing assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
